title: Personio Jobs Scraper
description: Discover, scrape, and search jobs from companies using Personio as their ATS. Auto-discovers companies -- no manual URL input needed. Personio is the dominant HR platform in Europe, used by N26, Celonis, Gorillas, and hundreds more.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description:
How to run the scraper:
- 'all' -- Auto-discover ALL companies and scrape every job board. Zero config.
- 'companies' -- Scrape only the company slugs you specify.
- 'search' -- Search a specific company's jobs by keyword (fast, single API call).
mode.sectionDescription: Choose how you want to discover and scrape Personio job boards.

companies.title: Company Slugs (Subdomains)
companies.description:
Personio subdomains to scrape. Used in 'companies' and 'search' modes.

The slug is the subdomain in {slug}.jobs.personio.de. Examples: 'n26', 'celonis', 'gorillas', 'personio'.

Not sure of the slug? Run in 'all' mode first -- the output includes every slug.
companies.sectionDescription: Specify which companies to scrape. Leave empty for 'all' mode.

locationFilter.title: Location/Office Filter
locationFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job office/location.

Examples:
- 'berlin|munich|hamburg' -- German cities
- 'remote' -- Any location containing 'remote'
- 'europe|germany|uk|france' -- European jobs
- 'prague|czech' -- Specific city/country

departmentFilter.title: Department Filter
departmentFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match departments.

Examples:
- 'engineering|product' -- Tech roles
- 'sales|marketing|growth' -- Go-to-market
- 'design|creative' -- Design teams
- 'data|machine.learning|ai' -- Data/ML roles

officeFilter.title: Office Filter
officeFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match office names.

Examples:
- 'berlin|london|amsterdam' -- European offices
- 'remote' -- Remote offices
- 'new york|san francisco' -- US offices

keywordFilter.title: Title/Keyword Filter
keywordFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match job titles and keywords.

Examples:
- 'senior|staff|lead|principal' -- Senior roles
- 'full.?stack|fullstack' -- Full-stack engineers
- 'react|typescript|node' -- Tech-specific
- 'founding|head.of|vp|director' -- Leadership
- 'intern|junior|entry' -- Entry-level

seniorityFilter.title: Seniority Filter
seniorityFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match seniority level.

Examples:
- 'senior|lead' -- Senior roles
- 'junior|entry' -- Entry-level
- 'mid' -- Mid-level

employmentTypeFilter.title: Employment Type Filter
employmentTypeFilter.description:
Regex pattern to match employment type.

Examples:
- 'permanent' -- Permanent roles
- 'contract|freelance' -- Contract work
- 'intern' -- Internships

includeContent.title: Include Full Descriptions
includeContent.description: Include the full HTML job descriptions in output. Increases dataset size significantly. Default: off to keep results lean.

concurrency.title: Concurrency
concurrency.description: Number of parallel requests. Personio rate-limits aggressively, so keep this low. Recommended: 3-5.

outputFormat.title: Output Format
outputFormat.description:
How to format output records:
- 'unified' (default) — Normalized schema consistent across all ATS platforms with structured location, salary, company objects
- 'raw' — Native Personio format, no normalization
- 'both' — Unified schema with original Personio data in the 'raw' field

maxCompanies.title: Max Companies
maxCompanies.description: Limit the number of companies to scrape. 0 = no limit (scrape all). Useful for testing or staying within budget.

language.title: Language
language.description:
Language parameter for job listings. Default: 'en' (English).

Examples:
- 'en' -- English
- 'de' -- German
- 'fr' -- French
